vulnerabilities.message: Password exposed to Local Storage Local Storage
vulnerabilities.remediationSummary: Verify that shared data aligns with the sensitive data types defined in your privacy notice and data processing agreement. Adjust or restrict sharing as necessary to maintain compliance and minimize privacy risks.
